creator: susan.stanziano@xinuos.com
text:
I have kyua installed (version 0.13_2,3) on a SCO OpenServer10 R3M1 VM (based on FreeBSD10.3).  

If I run "kyua report --results-filter" I should only see failed tests, but I see all test results.

If I run "kyua report --results-filter=failed" as Enji suggested, I still see all results, and not just failed tests.

I installed FreeBSD12 on a VM with Kyua version 0.13_4,3 and the report option worked as expected and I see only failed tests.

Comment from Enji: "There are a number of kyua integration tests that fail on 10.x and 11.x. I wonder if the issue is a part of the root cause."
